name: @lesto/example-live-capstone
description: Tier-4 v1 capstone (ADR 0042 Inc8): ONE multi-tenant local-first app proving the full v1 together — the per-row shape-authz matrix, offline writes, and cross-tab — on the REAL Postgres logical-replication path AND the SQLite v0 poll, behind the SAME live() surface. The epic-closing gallery-as-QA gate.
